patches_added.name: MyGate
patches_added.description: Unlocks MyGate premium, removes ads, fixes notifications and e-Intercom.

patches_removed.name: Flutter Premium Bypass
patches_removed.description: Forces premium status inside the JSON payload sent to Flutter

patches_removed.name: Hide ads
patches_removed.description: Removes MyGate in-app ads (pre-approval screen, allow-entries screen, activity feed, and visitor profile masthead).

patches_removed.name: Unlock premium
patches_removed.description: Unlocks all MyGate premium features: spoofs USER_PREMIUM_PLAN status, suppresses upgrade dialogs and paywalls, enables frequent pre-approvals for deliveries, cabs and visiting help, unlocks surprise delivery and the always-approve-entries toggle.
